series_metadata.series_title: TENANT INVOICES-OLIVER R. OCASEK GOVERNMENT BUILDING
series_metadata.series_description: Tenant invoices for tenant improvements, garage and antenna rent. Shows date, work order number, description and amount.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in operating area while project is under construction, or current fiscal year 1 additional fiscal year while in operation. in storage 3 additional fiscal years
